allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\) is listening on 5000" } } else { "Port 5000 is free" })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 29812 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "Still listening: PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 5000 is free" })
